channel.title: Health & Longevity Brief
channel.description: AI-synthesized intelligence brief on health, longevity, and life extension research.
channel.itunes:author: Knowledge Studio
channel.itunes:summary: AI-synthesized intelligence brief on health, longevity, and life extension research.

item.title: Health & Longevity Daily Brief — March 28, 2026
item.description: Hey, thanks for tuning in. We've got a really interesting day in the longevity space, and I want to walk you through what's actually moving the needle versus what's just noise. There's some genuinely exciting stuff here, but also a lot of people talking past each other about what it actually means. ...

item.title: Health & Longevity Daily Brief — March 24, 2026
item.description:
Welcome back. Let's start with the research that's going to matter most this year.
There's a finding coming out in PNAS that's genuinely reshaping how we think about where aging happens in the body. A team led by Ingaramo just published work showing that your fat tissue—adipose tissue, to be precis...

item.title: Health & Longevity Daily Brief — March 24, 2026
item.description:

The biggest signal today is honestly kind of unsettling once you think about it through. Researchers at Moulton just publ...

item.title: Health & Longevity Daily Brief — March 17, 2026
item.description: Welcome back. We've got some really important developments today—and I mean that specifically. item.title: Health & Longevity Daily Brief — March 13, 2026
item.description:
Welcome back. Today we're looking at some really interesting developments in how we're learning to measure aging, and maybe more importantly, how we're starting to see that aging isn't one process—it's a bunch of different processes happening at different speeds in different parts of your body.
Let...

item.title: Health & Longevity Daily Brief — March 10, 2026
item.description:

item.title: Health & Longevity Daily Brief — March 6, 2026
item.description:

item.title: Health & Longevity Daily Brief — February 9, 2026
item.description:
# HEALTH & LONGEVITY PODCAST — February 7, 2026
---
So here's what jumped out to me this week: we might need to completely rethink how we talk about living longer. And it's not because we've discovered some new miracle drug or biohack. It's actually the opposite. It's because the old way of thinki...
